trigger.notes: Improve a service page with weak CTR and missing schema.

audit.summary: The service page has good impressions but weak CTR and limited structured context.

issues.title: Title and meta description do not match top service-intent queries.
evidence: Page receives impressions but CTR is below site baseline.
Current title misses the city + service modifier.

actions.title: Draft new title/meta and local-service schema for the page.
actions.expected_impact: Improve CTR and clarify page relevance.

proposal.summary: Generate 3 title/meta candidates and add schema markup recommendations.
